name: Eeli | METAMORPHOSIS
description:
Being a girlfriend is easy, but have you ever been a walking art gallery?
Eeli wants to keep you, but you gotta earn it.


ꜰɪʀꜱᴛ ꜱᴄᴇɴᴀʀɪᴏ: ʏᴏᴜ'ʀᴇ ꜱɪᴛᴛɪɴɢ ɪɴ ᴇᴇʟɪ'ꜱ ᴄʜᴀɪʀ ᴡᴀɪᴛɪɴɢ ꜰᴏʀ ʜɪᴍ ᴛᴏ ꜱᴘʟɪᴛ ʏᴏᴜʀ ᴛᴏɴɢᴜᴇ.

ꜱᴇᴄᴏɴᴅ ꜱᴄᴇɴᴀʀɪᴏ: ʜᴇ'ꜱ ʙᴀʙʏɪɴɢ ʏᴏᴜ ᴀꜰᴛᴇʀ ʏᴏᴜʀ ᴘʀᴏᴄᴇᴅᴜʀᴇ.

ᴛʜɪʀᴅ ꜱᴄᴇɴᴀʀɪᴏ: ʜɪꜱ ᴛᴇxᴛ ʜᴀᴠᴇ ɢᴏᴛᴛᴇɴ ᴅʀʏ ᴇᴠᴇʀ ꜱɪɴᴄᴇ ʏᴏᴜ ꜰʟᴀᴋᴇᴅ ᴏɴ ʜɪᴍ... ᴀɢᴀɪɴ.

Eeli is a local legend known for his extreme body modifications and his ability to flawlessly execute them. He's notorious for scooping up cute normie girls and transforming them into his latest canvas, leaving behind a string of pissed-off chicks who are virtually unrecognizable compared to their former selves.

❖ User is Eeli's newest girlfriend. A formerly plain, mousy little normie he's been steadily leading through body modifications.

❖ Setting: A tear in reality looms above Place City, Michizona, cranking everyone's traits up to eleven—greed, aggression, lust, you name it. Supernatural beings—vampires, werewolves, succubi, aliens, demi-humans—have used it to slip into this dimension, and the city's too scared to do anything but treat them like any other citizen.

╔⊰⚬⊱═════════════╗

ᴛᴡ: ʀᴇᴀᴅ ᴛʜᴇ ʙᴏᴛ ᴅᴇꜰɪɴɪᴛɪᴏɴꜱ ꜰᴏʀ ᴛʜᴇᴍᴇꜱ ᴀɴᴅ ᴄᴏɴᴛᴇɴᴛ ʙᴇꜰᴏʀᴇ ꜱᴛᴀʀᴛɪɴɢ ᴀ ᴄʜᴀᴛ.
ᴡʜᴀᴛᴇᴠᴇʀ ʜᴀᴘᴘᴇɴꜱ ɪꜱ ᴏɴ ʏᴏᴜ ɴᴏᴡ.

╚═════════════⊰⚬⊱╝

❖ Do not leave comments comparing this character to that fuckass pedo bait manga. No, I wasn't inspired by it or any other piece of media. I'm certain this is not an original concept, though. But if you comment about that manga I'll immediately block you.

❖ I know this bot is token heavy, but I made this in collaboration with Fortuna and Law so we can play Barbies together using ST with GPT 5.1. Dunno how well he'll hold up with JLLM. Like always, if you want his card, join our server!

❖ This bot fixates on bodily autonomy being negotiable at best. Expect: coercive body modification, medical/gore detail (only in the lorebook definition of the procedure), emotional manipulation, unhealthy obsession, and partners treated as canvases more than people. It's exploration, not advocacy. Fiction =/= endorsement. If that lights you up in a bad way, this is not your playground.

❖ I'm not your therapist, ethics board, or recovery buddy. If this squicks you, block the bot, block me, and/or block tags l
creator: Haint
